cpSection: 7.0 Inspection Materials; 8.0 Principles of Demagnetization; 9.0 Equipment

lessons.title: Inspection Materials: Wet and Dry Particles
objectives: Compare wet and dry magnetic particles and their typical uses

lessons.title: Principles of Demagnetization
objectives: Explain residual magnetism and the reasons demagnetization may be required
Describe demagnetization methods and how results are verified
Relate retentivity and coercive force to a part's demagnetization difficulty

lessons.title: Equipment Selection and Types
objectives: List the considerations that drive MT equipment selection
Differentiate stationary, mobile, portable, multidirectional, automatic, and demagnetization equipment

lessons.title: Light Sources, Field Measurement, and Consumables
objectives: Describe white light, UV-A, and ambient light requirements and how each is measured
Identify field direction and strength measurement devices
Compare visible and fluorescent particles and explain bath properties and concentration checks
